title: boechera suffrutescens
intro: Boechera suffrutescens, also known as Alpine Rockcress, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It is native to the mountainous regions of North America and has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's leaves and flowers have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, and have been shown to have anti-cancer properties. Boechera suffrutescens can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote overall health and well-being.
